channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO $5 Entree — Code BOGO5
item.description: Buy any whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, Salad Stuffer, soup, or mac and get a second for just $5 using code BOGO5 at checkout. (Limited time)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu
item.description: Order up to 10 half-portion items — soups, sandwiches, salads — each at $4.99, saving roughly 40% off regular prices. (Ongoing)

item.title: Chipotle: PGA TOUR Hot Streak BOGO Entree
item.guid: Chipotle-PGA TOUR Hot Streak BOGO Entree-2026-07-06
item.description: During select PGA TOUR broadcasts, watch @PGATOUR on X or Instagram for a keyword drop, text it to 888222, and get a BOGO entree code. (Through Dec 31, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust
item.description: Get any pizza on any crust — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — with up to 7 toppings for $9.99 when you order online or in app. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: MyHut Box from $6.99
item.description: Pick any entree plus a side — 2-topping pizzas, Specialty Chicken, sandwiches, stuffed breads, boneless wings, pasta, or Loaded Tots — each for $6.99 (buy 2+). (Ongoing)

item.title: Dunkin': $6 Meal Deal
item.description: Score a medium hot or iced coffee plus two Wake-Up Wrap Sandwiches for just $6 at Dunkin'. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic Drive-In: America $2.50 Menu
item.description: Four items — Red, White & Blue Slush Float, Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, and Medium Onion Rings — all priced at $2.50 each. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: Papa John's: Toy Story Pizzas — $7.99 Each (Buy 2+)
item.description: Get Toy Story 5-themed pizzas (3 varieties) for $7.99 each (reg. $8.99) when you buy two or more; comes in a collectible Toy Story 5 box. (Limited time)

item.title: Arby's: $7.99 Meat & 3 Box
item.description: Choose a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich, pick three sides, and get a small drink — all for $7.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Einstein Bros. Bagels: $1.99 Any-Size Iced Coffee
item.guid: Einstein Bros. Bagels-$1.99 Any-Size Iced Coffee-2026-07-06
item.description: Grab any size iced coffee — Vanilla, Caramel, Chocolate, or Classic — for just $1.99 at participating Einstein Bros. locations nationwide. (Limited time)

item.title: Subway: Moana Meal Deal — Upgrade for $1
item.description: Upgrade any combo meal for just $1 more to receive one of five collectible Moana live-action film cups plus a $15 Fandango promo code. (Limited time)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: Score a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips with nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 via the Taco Bell app. (Ongoing)
